title: Listening To Celestial Lays
content:
'"Listening to celestial lays,
        Bending thy unclouded gaze
        On the pure and living light,
        Thou art blest, Aslauga's Knight!"
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Louisa May Alcott delivers a powerful performance in "Listening To Celestial Lays"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
